because.text: All findings confirmed by independent reproduction. P1 (LITERAL blob validation prose/oracle split) confirmed and sharpened: Book I s1.1 contradicts itself across two adjacent paragraphs, oracle+EV-LIT-FORCE implement the blob-outside-eval paragraph; disposition ADR-004 PROPOSED with both options, maintainer leaning Option 2 (a conforming blob store cannot contain a mismatched blob under its atom, so mismatch is local corruption which settled law forbids canonizing; reduction never demands the blob) contra the reviewer's Option 1 preference — review gate decides; interim law per s7 supremacy: eval MUST NOT depend on blob material in v0.5.x. P2 verifier-absent fixed: tools/warrant_verify.py shipped (ids, Ed25519 sigs, blob hashes, priors, DAG roots), README documents the two-root DAG topology. P2 selftest label fixed: 36864 -> 36863, assertion and WV-SELF-PARTIAL were already correct. Focus areas 1/2/4 clean; reviewer's own dead-malformed-data and duplication-chain probes accepted as correct attack shapes.

subject.note: Codex post-release audit of v0.5.0 (no P0, 1 P1, 2 P2) — audit review 1 of the post-v0.5.0 cycle
